violations.text: Cases of bottled water were observed stored on the floor under the 3-bay sink. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025

Scoop for sugar was observed with handle in contact with the sugar. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2025
The handles to the reach-in refrigerator were in poor repair, observed cracked and/or missing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Floor tiles in the back room and service area are in poor repair, observed cracked. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Ice and beverage residue was observed in hand washing sink in the front service area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/03/2024
Interior ice machine shield observed cracked and not completely attached. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
Handles at 2 door refrigerator and 2 door freezer observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2024
Plumbing under 3 bay sink observed leaking into a container. New Violation. Correct By: 01/17/2024
